iteration_1.changes: Rewrote SKILL.md from Chinese to concise English. Added specific bash patterns for file counting, extension analysis, largest file detection, content search, depth computation, and JSON output. Added batch rename section with bash implementation.

iteration_2.changes: Fixed batch rename: switched from bash to Python implementation to handle dot-preservation in filenames (e.g., v3.1 stays v3.1 not v3-1). Added warning not to create temp files in target directory. Added explicit note that dots/periods in filenames must be preserved.
